missingPet.description: A report that a pet is missing and help is requested to find it.

foundPet.description: A report that a pet has been found and its human is being sought.

sighting.description: A report that a potentially lost pet was sighted, without the reporter taking custody.

statusOpen.description: The listing is active and still needs attention.

statusReunited.description: The pet has been reunited with its human.

statusResolved.description: The listing no longer needs attention for another reason.

pet.description: Information describing the animal in a lost.pet listing.

species.description: Species or broad animal type. Values are suggestions, not a closed set.

colors.description: Visible coat, feather, scale, or marking colors.

sex.description: Observed or known sex. Values are suggestions, not a closed set.

description.description: Distinguishing marks, collar, temperament, medical needs, or other identifying details.

color.description: A visible animal color or marking.

location.description: Approximate public location associated with a listing. Coordinates are optional so authors can avoid overexposing sensitive locations.

name.description: Human-readable place, neighborhood, intersection, park, shelter, or landmark.

accuracyMeters.description: Approximate radius in meters for the public location.

geohash.description: Optional geohash for coarse geospatial indexing.

photo.description: A photo attached to a listing.

image.description: Image blob for the pet or the sighting context.

contact.description: Public contact guidance for a listing. Authors should avoid publishing sensitive personal details they do not want redistributed.

instructions.description: Public instructions for contacting the author, finder, shelter, or caretaker.

uri.description: Optional contact, canonical listing, shelter, or organization URL.
